ABOUT.LEAD: At the end of October, dozens of academic conferences will be held across the country in a wide range of research fields, as part of an initiative to strengthen ties between Israeli researchers and research institutions, both in Israel and abroad.
ABOUT.CONTENT_1: The initiative, in collaboration with the Israel Young Academy, seeks to leverage the arrival of thousands of Israeli researchers from abroad to Israel during the Knesset election period to create professional meetings, encourage research collaborations, reveal new academic opportunities, and strengthen the international status of Israeli academia.
ABOUT.CONTENT_2: Mind-IL invites researchers and industry partners to take part in a celebration of scientific excellence, creativity, and international cooperation.
ABOUT.CONTENT_3: If you mind about the future of science and research in Israel, join us.
ABOUT.GO_TO_EVENTS: For the list of conferences click here

CONFERENCES_DESC.Behavioral Change: An academic conference dedicated to advancing research on the mechanisms, processes, and applications of behavioral change across disciplines. The conference brings together scholars from economics, psychology, management, marketing and related fields to foster rigorous discussion, exchange ideas, and promote interdisciplinary collaboration. The program will span a broad range of topics, including behavioral and experimental economics, social cognition, motivation, consumer behavior, judgment and decision making, and organizational behavior. Additional perspectives from adjacent fields - such as applied economics, game theory, and cognitive and neuroscientific approaches - may also be included where they contribute to understanding behavioral change. Our goal is to create a collegial and intellectually engaging environment that supports high-quality research, constructive dialogue, and the development of new collaborations across disciplines.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Physics: A scientific symposium bringing together the Israeli physics community — researchers based at universities and institutes in Israel, alongside colleagues working at institutions abroad who happen to be in the country during this period. The meeting offers an opportunity to share recent results, identify new collaborations, and strengthen scientific ties across the field — both within the local community and beyond it.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Chemistry: We aim to take advantage of multiple visits by Israeli scientists working abroad during October 2026. These visits provide an opportunity to reinforce scientific connections and to network with the Israeli chemistry community across all sub-disciplines, including Organic Chemistry, Physical and Theoretical Chemistry, Materials Science and Nanotechnology, Inorganic Chemistry, and Biochemistry
CONFERENCES_DESC.Mathematics: Several mini-conferences and workshops are being organized, including an 'Action Now' (groups and dynamics) conference; additional events are in earlier stages of planning and will be announced in due course.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Computer Science: An international conference of computer science researchers in memory of Michael Rabin (1941–2025). The conference will include a memorial session honoring Professor Michael O. Rabin, Turing Award laureate and one of the pioneers of computer science in Israel and worldwide, who passed away in April of this year. The program will also feature several parallel sessions in different research areas. In addition, the conference will host several keynote speakers, including Prof. Shafi Goldwasser, Prof. Irit Dinur, and Prof. Ronitt Rubinfeld.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Earth Science and Engineering, Porous Me: The Israeli Chapter of InterPore (the International Society for Porous Media) focuses on igniting and fostering collaboration among a broad network of porous media researchers from different disciplines, active in academia, research institutes, and industry. The conference is open to all research students, postdocs, and early/middle/senior stage researchers and engineers in academia and industry, working in the multi-disciplinary research field of natural and industrial porous media systems. The meeting offers an opportunity to share recent results, identify new collaborations, and strengthen scientific ties across the field — both within the local community and beyond it.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Data Science, Operations and Analytics: We invite researchers, practitioners, and students to participate in this interdisciplinary conference on Operations, Industrial Engineering, Statistics and Data Science. The conference will be devided into two clusters: Operations/IE and Statistics/Data Science, providing a forum for presenting new research, exchanging ideas, and fostering collaborations across disciplines that develop analytical, computational, and data-driven approaches to decision-making. We welcome contributions spanning theory, methods, and applications in areas such as optimization, analytics, machine learning, service systems, supply chains, healthcare, transportation, sustainability and related topics.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Chemical Engineering and Computational C: A scientific symposium bringing together the Israeli Chemical Engineering and Chemical Kinetics communities — researchers based at universities and institutes in Israel, alongside colleagues working at institutions abroad. The meeting offers an opportunity to share recent results, identify new collaborations, and strengthen scientific ties across the field — both within the local community and beyond it.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Cancer Biology Across Scales: This one-day gathering will bring together leading scientists, clinicians, innovators, and industry leaders from across academia, biotechnology, medtech, and medicine to celebrate the strength and global impact of Israeli cancer research. Beyond showcasing outstanding science, the meeting aims to create a unique opportunity for reconnection, exchange, and new collaborations across the Israeli scientific ecosystem, both locally and abroad. The program will highlight cutting-edge discoveries and emerging directions in cancer biology, while fostering meaningful interactions among researchers working across disciplines and sectors.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Genomics & Computational Biology: A conference in computational biology celebrates one of the most powerful frameworks for understanding biology, now amplified by AI: turning complex biological data into mechanistic insight, prediction, and discovery.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Brain and Mind: A multidisciplinary research day on brain–mind and mental health, bringing together researchers and clinicians from neuroscience, psychiatry, psychology, engineering, and medicine to address questions at the intersection of brain and mind. The meeting will focus on innovative computational approaches and objective markers for diagnosis, monitoring, and treatment in mental health, including physiological markers, treatment prediction, real-time monitoring, research in clinical populations, and personalized treatment.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Neuroscience: A broad and integrative conference that brings together researchers from Israel and across the world across covering the full spectrum of neuroscience, from molecular and cellular mechanisms to systems neuroscience, cognition, behavior, mental health, and clinical applications. The meeting will provide a platform for scientists and clinicians from diverse disciplines to share discoveries, exchange ideas, and foster new collaborations. By spanning levels of investigation from molecules and circuits to cognition, psychiatry, and patient care, the conference aims to create opportunities for researchers across basic, translational, and clinical neuroscience, as well as those working in cognitive science, psychology, and the study of the mind
CONFERENCES_DESC.Ecology and Conservation Biology: A dedicated symposium in ecology, including ecology (general), zoology, plant ecology, entomology, and conservation science.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Jewish Studies: This one-day conference on Jewish Studies and Hebrew literature will address key questions concerning the current challenges of the field, alongside poster presentations by early-career scholars and roundtable discussions
CONFERENCES_DESC.Central Issues in Philosophy: Past and P: The conference will cast a broad net, bringing together philosophers from a range of different sub-disciplines, both historical and contemporary, to explore together central themes of philosophical thought.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Imagining Machines? Art, Architecture an: Imagining Machines? Art, Architecture and Performance in the Age of Artificial Intelligence is an interdisciplinary research conference for scholars in the arts. It examines the impact of AI technologies on research, interpretation, creation, and representation in both theoretical and practice-based research. It focuses on human imagination versus computational processes, changing author/researcher status, new operational modes of image, space, sound, body, and performance, and the aesthetic, cultural, ethical, and political implications of AI in artistic research.
CONFERENCES_DESC.History: An ongoing past: an international conference for Israeli historians. This conference is aimed at Israeli academics in the fields of history to promote collaborations between Israeli researchers abroad and in Israel. Cross-cutting topics from different historical periods will be discussed.
CONFERENCES_DESC.History & Philosophy of Science & Ideas: A broad academic conference intended for Israeli academics engaged in the history and/or philosophy of science and ideas in their broadest sense.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Economics and Finance: Bridging Horizons: The conference will celebrate Israeli economists in Israel and abroad. It will cover a broad range of fields, including theory, applied microeconomics, macroeconomics, and finance.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Childhood from a Multidisciplinary Persp: The conference will serve as a platform for presenting innovations, exchanging ideas, and creating collaborations around three central axes: Development (Neurodevelopmental, emotional, and social aspects of early childhood and school aged children); Education (Learning in the digital age, evidence-based educational interventions, and emotional-developmental pedagogy); and Health (Preventive pediatrics, mental health in childhood, and advanced clinical treatment methods).
CONFERENCES_DESC.Political Science: A political science conference aimed to convene, exchange ideas and engage in academic discussions on political questions, broadly construed.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Communication: This conference seeks to bring together scholars working across the diverse subfields of communication to explore how communication functions in times marked by instability, contestation, and change. We welcome theoretical, empirical, and methodological contributions that examine communication across different contexts, media environments, and levels of analysis.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Psychology: A unique conference bringing together researchers from a wide range of areas in psychology, with the goal of inspiring new ideas and fostering new collaborations between scientists in Israel and abroad
CONFERENCES_DESC.Strategy, Innovation and Entrepreneurshi: The conference will bring together leading scholars, to advance the study and practice of strategic management in one of the world's most dynamic business environments. The conference will provide a forum for rigorous academic research on competitive advantage, organizational growth, and value creation. A central focus is the intersection of strategy with innovation and entrepreneurship—reflecting Israel's distinctive position as a global hub for technological ventures, startup activity, and knowledge-intensive industries. Sessions will explore how firms build and sustain advantage through innovation, how entrepreneurial ecosystems shape national competitiveness, and how emerging technologies are reshaping the strategic landscape.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Gender and Family Studies: The conference will include academic discussions on questions related to family, motherhood, fatherhood, care, gender, kinship, intimacy, and social change.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Law: The 'Innovations in Law' conference is designed for academics from all fields of law, including but not limited to public law, private law, commercial law, international law, criminal law, family law, and labor law.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Sociology and Anthropology: The conference 'Ongoing Crisis: Culture, Economy, Politics, Environment, and Security' is intended for academics in the fields of sociology and anthropology.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Public Health: The conference will explore current public health challenges in the age of the new normal, including response to acute challenges such as climate change, pandemics, health inequalities, from a multi disciplinary perspective.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Cities and Complexity in Israel: Towards: Cities and Complexity in Israel: Towards the Second Quarter of the 21st Century is an interdisciplinary research conference that seeks to examine the Israeli city as a complex, dynamic, and multi-layered system, against the background of the social, spatial, environmental, technological, and political challenges expected in the coming decades. The conference will deal with questions related to urbanization and densification processes, transportation and mobility, the built environment, spatial inequality, urban resilience, climate, infrastructure, urban governance, smart technologies, communities, and relationships between different scales of planning and action. At its center will be the thinking of the city not as a closed planning object, but as a changing system of connections, flows, networks, and emerging behaviors. The conference will offer a space for critical and applied discussion on the ways in which complexity theories, computational tools, empirical research, and planning practices can contribute to understanding cities in Israel and shaping updated urban policy towards the second quarter of the 21st century.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Developmental Biology, Stem Cells, and R: A conference in computational biology celebrates one of the most powerful frameworks for understanding biology, now amplified by AI: turning complex biological data into mechanistic insight, prediction, and discovery.
CONFERENCES_DESC.Network Dynamics in Socio-Technical Syst: Network Dynamics in Socio-Technical Systems: From Resilient Control to Incentives and Information Design.
